SEARCH
Package org.opentcs.data.order

Interface TransportOrderHistoryCodes

public interface TransportOrderHistoryCodes
Defines constants for basic history event codes related to transport orders and documents how the respective supplementary information is to be interpreted.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    ORDER_ASSIGNED_TO_VEHICLE
    An event code indicating a transport order was assigned to a vehicle.
    static final String
    ORDER_CREATED
    An event code indicating a transport order has been created.
    static final String
    ORDER_DISPATCHING_DEFERRED
    An event code indicating dispatching of a transport order to a vehicle has been deferred.
    static final String
    ORDER_DISPATCHING_RESUMED
    An event code indicating dispatching of a transport order to a vehicle has been resumed.
    static final String
    ORDER_DRIVE_ORDER_FINISHED
    An event code indicating one of a transport order's drive orders has been finished.
    static final String
    ORDER_PROCESSING_VEHICLE_CHANGED
    An event code indicating a transport order's processing vehicle changed.
    static final String
    ORDER_REACHED_FINAL_STATE
    An event code indicating a transport order was marked as being in a final state.
    static final String
    ORDER_RESERVED_FOR_VEHICLE
    An event code indicating a transport order was reserved for a vehicle.

  • Field Details

    • ORDER_CREATED

      static final String ORDER_CREATED
      An event code indicating a transport order has been created.

      The history entry's supplements list is empty.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ORDER_DISPATCHING_DEFERRED

      static final String ORDER_DISPATCHING_DEFERRED
      An event code indicating dispatching of a transport order to a vehicle has been deferred.

      The history entry's supplements list contains the reasons for the deferral.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ORDER_DISPATCHING_RESUMED

      static final String ORDER_DISPATCHING_RESUMED
      An event code indicating dispatching of a transport order to a vehicle has been resumed.

      The history entry's supplements list is empty.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ORDER_ASSIGNED_TO_VEHICLE

      static final String ORDER_ASSIGNED_TO_VEHICLE
      An event code indicating a transport order was assigned to a vehicle.

      The history entry's supplements list contains one item with the name of the vehicle the transport order was assigned to.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ORDER_RESERVED_FOR_VEHICLE

      static final String ORDER_RESERVED_FOR_VEHICLE
      An event code indicating a transport order was reserved for a vehicle.

      The history entry's supplements list contains one item with the name of the vehicle the transport order was reserved for.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ORDER_PROCESSING_VEHICLE_CHANGED

      static final String ORDER_PROCESSING_VEHICLE_CHANGED
      An event code indicating a transport order's processing vehicle changed.

      The history entry's supplements list contains on item with the name of the new processing vehicle, or the empty string, if the processing vehicle was unset.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ORDER_REACHED_FINAL_STATE

      static final String ORDER_REACHED_FINAL_STATE
      An event code indicating a transport order was marked as being in a final state.

      The history entry's supplements list is empty.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ORDER_DRIVE_ORDER_FINISHED

      static final String ORDER_DRIVE_ORDER_FINISHED
      An event code indicating one of a transport order's drive orders has been finished.

      The history entry's supplements list is empty.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
